MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Annie Wong (Petitioner).

The Court informed Mr. Madden that he has to do an accounting that is closer to the distribution date (end of September), that he needs to create a guardianship and that the amount of fees requested is lower than the statutory fee amount. The First Report and Petition for Final Distribution Upon Waiver of Accounting and the Second Amended First and Final Account are continued to October 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
